title: calea sabazioides
intro: Calea sabazioides, also known as Mexican Dream Herb or Salvia, is a plant species native to Mexico that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and sedative effects. The health benefits of Calea sabazioides include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of depression. The herbal preparations of Calea sabazioides include tea, tincture, and infusion, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
